flake

[...] ... [...]

[...] x ZAG LI x [...]

[...] ... burāšu-juniper x [...]

[...] ⸢DA⸣ SI IGI-MIN-šu₂ MAR x [...]

[...] ... you anoint his eyes ... [...]

[...] x A NU x [...]

[...] ... [...]

[...] x (x) ⸢ŠUB?⸣-šu₂ 5 ⸢ŠE⸣ u₂KUR.⸢RA⸣ [...]

[...] ... together grain(s) of mountain honey [...]
